name: team-skills
description: LGWF Codex skills for workflow routing, monitoring, and improvement.

interface.longDescription: LGWF Workflow Tools packages the Codex facade skill for routing user requests to suitable workflows, monitoring workflow execution, and improving workflow behavior from run evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use /lgwf-wf-tools to route this request to a suitable workflow.
Check available LGWF workflows before choosing an execution path.
Improve the LGWF workflow facade from recent execution evidence.
